name: chain_weve_built_our_paid_newsletter_write_wi
method:
We've built our paid newsletter Write With AI to $400k in annual subscription revenue and $800k+ in digital product sales.

This is the exact roadmap to follow if you want to launch your own newslette

stages.task: Generate newsletter edition from top alpha entries and trending topics in our niche verticals (AI tools, solopreneur tactics, automation)
Score newsletter draft against engagement metrics and no-slop rules. Reject if below 7/10.
Post to Beehiiv, generate 3 social teasers, queue cross-posts
Every 10 editions, bundle into paid digital product (PDF guide, template pack). Route to DIGITAL_PRODUCTS pipeline.
